strengths: 17+ years of hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems — exceeding the 15-year threshold for a Director-level IC role
Current Staff Engineer role at re:cinq explicitly contributing to AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic workflow frameworks — direct alignment with the AI strategy mandate

Founder of GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform on Kubernetes) plus repeated track record of conference talks, workshops, and courses — demonstrates entrepreneurial drive and the ability to inspire others internally and externally
concerns: No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field (preferred qualification)
No explicit large-scale cloud-platform or hyperscaler product leadership called out on the resume
Current title is Staff/Senior rather than Principal/Director, so the step-up in scope of influence would be a stretch

key_factors.factor: AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq
15+ years of multi-domain engineering (web, mobile, embedded, low-latency backend)
Founder of GISCollective and active community speaker/educator

response.justification: Bogdan brings well over the required 15 years of engineering experience spanning embedded systems at National Instruments, ultra-low-latency microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, fintech at RIDE Capital, and full-stack product work at Optilyz — exactly the broad builder/code/design fluency the role calls for. His current role at re:cinq is squarely in the AI space, building MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, which maps directly to the AI-strategy and AI-powered product-development focus areas. As founder of the open-source GISCollective platform and a recurring conference speaker, workshop leader, and course creator, he has repeatedly demonstrated the entrepreneurial initiative and ability to inspire others that the job description emphasizes.
